sections.intent: Intro to Aalto University: What is it about?

slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution focused on educating future thought-leaders through six distinct schools. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution focused on educating future thought-leaders through six distinct schools.

slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science.

slides.layoutHint: Include a clear call-to-action button graphic or icon for 'Apply' and 'Visit'.
mustInclude: Aalto offers open courses, scholarships, and campus visits for everyone regardless of background.

sections.title: Approved outline
